ns0:entry.ns0:title: Musixal/Backhaul
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Musixal/Backhaul
Language: go
Lightning-fast reverse tunneling solution for NAT traversal, optimized for handling massive concurrent connections with tcp, tcpmux, udp, udp over tcp, ws, wsmux, wss and wssmux support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/k8s-device-plugin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/k8s-device-plugin
Language: go
NVIDIA device plugin for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ccfos/nightingale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ccfos/nightingale
Language: go
Nightingale is to monitoring and alerting what Grafana is to visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cilium/cilium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cilium/cilium
Language: go
eBPF-based Networking, Security, and Observability

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
Language: go
CloudNativePG is a comprehensive platform designed to seamlessly manage PostgreSQL databases within Kubernetes environments, covering the entire operational lifecycle from initial deployment to ongoing maintenance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: containerd/containerd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/containerd/containerd
Language: go
An open and reliable container runtime

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dolthub/dolt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dolthub/dolt
Language: go
Dolt – Git for Data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evcc-io/evcc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evcc-io/evcc
Language: go
solar charging ☀️🚘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gin-gonic/gin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gin-gonic/gin
Language: go
Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleapis/mcp-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox
Language: go
MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open source MCP server for databases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/loki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/loki
Language: go
Like Prometheus, but for logs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jackc/pgx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jackc/pgx
Language: go
PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/buildkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/buildkit
Language: go
concurrent, cache-efficient, and Dockerfile-agnostic builder toolkit

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ollama/ollama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ollama/ollama
Language: go
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocket-id/pocket-id
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocket-id/pocket-id
Language: go
A simple and easy-to-use OIDC provider that allows users to authenticate with their passkeys to your services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sartoopjj/thefeed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sartoopjj/thefeed
Language: go
DNS-based feed reader for Telegram channels and public X accounts. Designed for environments where only DNS queries work.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yusing/godoxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yusing/godoxy
Language: go
High-performance reverse proxy and container orchestrator for self-hosters
